warningDesc:
This plugin is not allowed to be used as a tool to monitor others' behavior.
Any data generated and used by this plugin, such as notifications/reports/logs/status records/screenshots/screen recordings/variable names, etc., are for personal convenience only and are not to be used as any legal basis/evidence.
The developer of this plugin does not collect any of your data, but the two SaaS providers used by this plugin may have their own privacy policies.
That is to say, your device name and device identifier will be transmitted as part of the URI in the form of plain text webhook or WS to the servers running Bark and GoEasy. Although they cannot be seen by any man-in-the-middle under TLS encryption, the SaaS providers can see them in principle.
Please make sure you have read and agreed to their privacy policies and terms of service.
barkApiBaseLinkDesc:
The baselink for the Bark API, please obtain it after downloading the Bark app.
Example: https://api.day.app/AbCdEfGhIjKmLnOpQrStUv
displayNoticeWhenBarkNotiSentDesc: When enabled, a notification will pop up on this machine after reporting the online behavior to the phone.
onlineLocalmachineNoticeText: This online behavior has been reported to the phone
barkOnlineNoticeContentHeader: SiYuan has just started on this device:
onlyEnableListedDevicesDesc: When the switch is on, the plugin functionality is enabled only on the devices listed in the table. When the switch is off, the plugin functionality is enabled on all devices.
enableDeviceList: List of Devices to Enable Online Notifications
enableDeviceListDesc: This restriction only applies to Bark online notifications, as not all devices need online notifications. The devices listed in the table will have the plugin functionality enabled when the switch is on. Please avoid manual editing of this table.
addCurrentDeviceIntoListDesc: Add the current device to the table
removeCurrentDeviceFromListDesc: Remove the current device from the table
hintDesc:
• ● Made by zxkmm, open-sourced under the GPL license.
  • ● If you like this plugin, please give my GitHub repository a free star⭐ (Star).
  • ● Link: siyuan_online_devices_mgr
goeasySwitchDesc: This feature requires you to correctly fill in the GoEasy token.
goeasyTokenDesc: Please refer to the following link to obtain the token: Link
barkMsgSwitch: Send Device Online Notification via Bark
barkMsgSwitchDesc: This feature requires you to correctly fill in the GoEasy webhook baselink.
textSendBroadcastClipboardPlaceholder: This will be sent to all online devices. Note: if the target device doesn't have a clipboard manager, the previous clipboard content will be overwritten and cannot be retrieved.
textSendMessagePlaceholder: e.g., Don't look at my notes!
textSendToClipboardPlaceholder: This will send content to the target device's clipboard. Note: if the target device doesn't have a clipboard manager, the previous clipboard content will be overwritten and cannot be retrieved.
textSetAutoPasswordPlaceholder: Enter new Access Auth Code, please remember it carefully, otherwise you may have difficulty (or impossible) to unlock that device later.
textSetAutoPasswordConfirmPlaceholder: Please enter the Access Auth Code again to confirm
textPasswordMismatch: The two Access Auth Codes entered do not match, please try again.
textPasswordHistoryDesc: Records the access codes set from this device in case you forget them.
textLockFail: Lock failed, most likely because the remote device has no access auth code set. Please use the 'Set Access Auth Code' feature first.
goeasyTokenMissing: Please fill in the GoEasy Token first
barkUrlMissing: Please fill in the Bark API Baselink first
name: Online Devices Manager
beggingDesc:
This plugin is open source and free, so I need your encouragement.
If you like the features this plugin brings you, you can consider donating to help me with basic living expenses 🍚: Donate. (Donations won't unlock additional features)
If you're not financially comfortable, you can encourage me by giving a free ⭐ star to my GitHub repository.
If you or someone you know needs my skills, feel free to hire me anytime.
